g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the CDK developer machine do at deploy time?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudFormation do with the CDK template?')
sendPrompt('What are the schema files used for at deploy time?')
sendPrompt('What does the Glue Data Catalog store for each table?')
sendPrompt('What is an external table in Glue and how is it different from a managed table?')
sendPrompt('What does the S3 data lake bucket store and how is it structured?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda function do and when does it run?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the S3 event notification and what does it do?')
sendPrompt('How does EventBridge schedule the partition refresh?')
sendPrompt('What IAM permissions does the Lambda role need?')
sendPrompt('What IAM permissions does the Glue reader role have?')
